meaning: adj.不曲的,坚决的,不屈的,冷漠的,随意的,松驰的n.不拘束,随意
examples: Perhaps, this is the unbending youth from northeast of China.
And its look, rude, unbending, lusty, made me think of myself.
This means not blindly applying rules to all in an equal, unbending and algorithmic fashion.
Thatcher's unbending opposition to the trade unions is behind many people's dislike, he said.
